prompt: Create a cinematic widescreen anime night scene in a dense old East Asian city street after rain, with a lone young man a blond young man in a sleeveless black outfit running away from the viewer toward an ornate temple gate at the end of the street. Use a low, centered camera angle from behind the runner, making him the dominant silhouette in the foreground with one leg lifted mid-stride and arms pumping. The setting is a narrow wet alley lined with weathered shopfronts, shuttered storefronts, vertical signboards with Chinese-style characters, hanging wires, potted plants, and glowing neon. At the far end, place an elaborate traditional temple facade and gateway with layered curved roofs, carved details, and glowing signage. The ground is slick with rain and reflects vivid teal, cyan, magenta, and hot pink lights. Include exactly 8 visible human figures: 1 central running protagonist in the foreground, 2 startled men on the left side of the street, 1 older bald man standing near the left storefront, 2 men near the temple entrance, 1 man on the right side of the entrance, and 1 small distant silhouette under the archway. Include exactly 5 prominent round lanterns on the right side, glowing pink and orange, plus smaller scattered lantern glows in the distance. Mood: tense, breathless, mysterious, slightly sacred and dangerous, like a chase through a neon temple district at midnight. Visual style: highly detailed 2D anime background painting, moody cyberpunk color grading, deep shadows, painterly linework, cinematic composition, atmospheric haze, high contrast rim lighting, reflective pavement, no photorealism. Color palette: deep teal shadows, cyan highlights, neon magenta, hot pink lantern light, dark indigo sky. Aspect ratio: wide 2.35:1 cinematic frame. Avoid readable modern branding, avoid cars, avoid daylight, avoid extra foreground characters, and keep the protagonist's face hidden from view.
